utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Fully specified according to the format requires specific flight details and a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, fully covered items: destination (1), travel_dates (2), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5). Not fully covered: transportation (missing detailed flight info), total_budget (missing complete breakdown). So 5 out of 7.
